insights: Particle reweighting improved median held-out prediction versus the prior ensemble.
Effective sample size stayed below 5% of particles, so posterior narrowing remains fragile.
The best median held-out method was exponential, so mechanistic fitting should be compared against simple baselines before product claims.
The lowest median posterior held-out error came from the shared_chemo_fixed_core variant.

warnings: Identifiability report is based on synthetic/demo particle behavior, not clinical evidence.
Low effective sample size; narrow posterior intervals may reflect too few surviving particles.
Synthetic fitting is a particle-reweighting sanity check, not clinical calibration.
